title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brigade Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brigade Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group:
Brigade Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
